description_long: This humanoid robot features a rounded, teal-colored body with a domed head and a large, black rectangular display on its front, showing a simple digital face with two white eyes and a straight mouth. Its arms and legs are constructed from metallic rods and joints, with red circular connectors at each articulation point, giving it a mechanical yet expressive appearance. The hands are claw-like, with three prongs each, and the feet are broad and sturdy, designed for stability. On the back, a prominent QR code is displayed, possibly for identification or interaction purposes. The robot's surface is slightly weathered, suggesting it is built for outdoor or urban environments. The overall design is functional and approachable, blending industrial elements with a friendly, cartoonish aesthetic.
description: A teal, dome-headed humanoid robot with a digital face display, red-jointed limbs, claw hands, and a QR code on its back. Its weathered surface and sturdy build suggest urban utility.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's digital face display, teal dome, and symmetrical red-jointed arms and legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the cylindrical body, arm articulation, and the depth of the torso and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a large QR code on the back and the mechanical structure of the legs and arms.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm and leg joints and the curvature of the body.
attribute_pose: The robot is standing upright with its arms relaxed and slightly bent at the elbows, hands hanging down, and legs straight and parallel. The torso is vertical and the head is aligned with the body.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only integrated panels and mechanical joints with no additional coverings or decorative elements.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a black rectangular display with two white square eyes and a straight white mouth, giving a simple, digital expression. No nose or other facial features are present.
attribute_limb_articulation: Each arm has three visible rotary joints (shoulder, elbow, wrist) and ends in a three-pronged claw hand. The legs have two main joints (hip, knee) and broad, articulated feet. All joints appear to be rotary and allow for a moderate range of motion.
